Everything you need to close more deals

Powerful tools designed specifically for banquet halls, hotels, and event venues.

Smart Lead Distribution

Get matched with leads that fit your venue capacity and pricing.

Location Based Leads

Dominate your local market with geo-targeted event requests.

Vendor CRM

Track conversations, follow-ups, and conversions in one place.

Supercharge your venue management

Everything you need to run your venue business, built into one powerful platform.

AI-Powered Quotations

Generate pixel-perfect, branded quotes in seconds. Our AI analyzes the lead requirements and suggests the optimal pricing package.

Instant Chat

Communicate with leads in real-time. Close deals faster while they're still hot.

Advanced Analytics

Track your conversion rates, revenue, and ROI with beautiful, easy-to-understand charts.

Custom Venue Profile

Showcase your venue with a stunning, SEO-optimized profile page that ranks on Google and attracts organic leads.

How PartyDial Works

We simplify the lead generation process so you can focus on hosting amazing events.

01

Event organizer submits request

Clients tell us what they need for their upcoming wedding, corporate event, or party.

02

AI matches vendors

Our algorithm instantly matches the request with the best-suited venues in the area.

03

You receive high-quality leads

Get notified instantly. Send a quote, chat with the client, and close the booking.

New Lead Received
Wedding Reception
High Intent
Guest Count250-300
Budget$15,000 - $20,000
DateOct 15, 2026

Why Top Venues Choose PartyDial

We don't just send leads, we send opportunities that grow your business.

Verified Leads

Every lead is phone-verified. No more wasting time on fake inquiries or window shoppers.

Higher Conversions

Our AI matching ensures you only get leads that fit your venue, leading to a 3x higher close rate.

Smart CRM Dashboard

Manage all your inquiries, send quotes, and track revenue from one easy-to-use dashboard.

See how PartyDial is transforming event businesses across the country.

Simple, transparent pricing

Choose the plan that fits your venue's growth goals.

Basic

$49/mo
10 Leads/mo
  • Basic CRM
  • Email Support
  • Standard Profile
Most Popular

Premium

$99/mo
30 Leads/mo
  • AI Quotation Generator

Elite

$199/mo
Unlimited Leads
  • Everything in Premium

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about the product and billing.

Every lead that comes through our platform is verified via SMS and email. We also use AI to score the intent of the lead based on their requirements, ensuring you only spend time on serious inquiries.

Yes! PartyDial integrates seamlessly with Google Calendar, Outlook, and Apple Calendar. When a booking is confirmed, it automatically blocks out the date across all your synced calendars.

On our Premium and Elite plans, you can send unlimited AI-generated quotes. The Basic plan includes up to 50 quotes per month.

Absolutely. There are no long-term contracts. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time directly from your dashboard.

Our AI analyzes the specific requirements of the lead (guest count, event type, date) and matches it against your pricing rules and packages to instantly generate a professional, branded PDF quote.

Ready to fill your venue calendar?

Join hundreds of top venues that are already using PartyDial to get high-quality leads and close more bookings.
